ChatMessages.Urge.IC.None.Pee.message: {target} doesn't feel the urge to pee right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.None.Poop.message: {target} doesn't feel the urge to poop right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Warning.Pee.message: {target} is {fgcolor:yellow}starting to feel the urge{/fgcolor} to pee.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Warning.Poop.message: {target} is {fgcolor:yellow}starting to feel the urge{/fgcolor} to poop.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Danger.Pee.message: {target} is {fgcolor:orange}feeling very uncomfortable{/fgcolor} - the pressure in {tpronoun:p} bladder is building up!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Danger.Poop.message: {target} is {fgcolor:orange}feeling very uncomfortable{/fgcolor} - the pressure in {tpronoun:p} bowels is building up!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Bursting.Pee.message: {target} {fgcolor:red}can't hold it much longer!{/fgcolor} If {tpronoun:s} doesn't find a toilet soon, {tpronoun:s} will wet {tpronoun:r}!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Bursting.Poop.message: {target} {fgcolor:red}can't hold it much longer!{/fgcolor} If {tpronoun:s} doesn't find a toilet soon, {tpronoun:s} will soil {tpronoun:r}!

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.None.Pee.message: {target} truly doesn't need to pee right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.None.Poop.message: {target} truly doesn't need to poop right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Warning.Pee.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to pee, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:yellow}is starting to need to go{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Warning.Poop.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to poop, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:yellow}is starting to need to go{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Danger.Pee.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to pee, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:orange}urgently needs to go{/fgcolor}!

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Danger.Poop.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to poop, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:orange}urgently needs to go{/fgcolor}!

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Bursting.Pee.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to pee, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:red}is on the verge of wetting {tpronoun:r}{/fgcolor}!

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Bursting.Poop.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to poop, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:red}is on the verge of soiling {tpronoun:r}{/fgcolor}!

ChatMessages.Action.Check.Inactive.message: {target}'s bodily functions are inactive right now.

ChatMessages.Action.Check.InCharacter.message: {target} checks if {tpronoun:s} needs to go potty...

ChatMessages.Action.Check.OutOfCharacter.message: You check to see if {target} needs to go potty...

ChatMessages.Action.Check.NoPeeWarning.message: ({tpronoun:sc} doesn't know it yet, but {tpronoun:s} will eventually {fgcolor:yellow}{glow:brown}wet {tpronoun:r}{/glow}{/fgcolor} without warning!)

ChatMessages.Action.Check.NoPoopWarning.message: ({tpronoun:sc} doesn't know it yet, but {tpronoun:s} will eventually {fgcolor:brown}{glow:yellow}soil {tpronoun:r}{/glow}{/fgcolor} without warning!)

ChatMessages.Action.Pee.Failed.message: You can't pee right now - you don't feel the urge to go yet.

ChatMessages.Action.Pee.Involuntary.message: {target} can't hold it any longer! {tpronoun:sc} is now {fgcolor:yellow}{glow:brown}peeing{/glow}{/fgcolor}, whether {tpronoun:s} likes it or not!

ChatMessages.Action.Poop.Failed.message: You can't poop right now - you don't feel the urge to go yet.

ChatMessages.Action.Poop.Involuntary.message: {target} can't hold it any longer! {tpronoun:sc} is now {fgcolor:brown}{glow:yellow}pooping{/glow}{/fgcolor}, whether {tpronoun:s} likes it or not!

ChatMessages.Action.Accident.Pee.message: {fgcolor:orange}({tpronoun:sc} didn't even know {tpronoun:s} needed to pee, and didn't have time to take off {tpronoun:p} underwear first! If {tpronoun:s} was wearing any, {tpronoun:s} just wet {tpronoun:r}!){/fgcolor}

ChatMessages.Action.Accident.Poop.message: {fgcolor:orange}({tpronoun:sc} didn't even know {tpronoun:s} needed to poop, and didn't have time to take off {tpronoun:p} underwear first! If {tpronoun:s} was wearing any, {tpronoun:s} just soiled {tpronoun:r}!){/fgcolor}
